tasks.description: Add routing guard to orchestrator.ts to prevent cascade failures
tasks.context: Implement CTO-20260309-001 in backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts. Add pre-execution validation that checks agent availability and task complexity before routing. Fail fast if agent offline or task exceeds complexity threshold. Prevent cascading timeouts.

review.summary: Dual-rejected: Claude (25/100) + Codex (20/100). Code is incomplete and truncated mid-function. Missing critical implementation details, tests, and proper error handling patterns. | The orchestrator service implementation is incomplete and will not compile. Key methods are cut off, there are no tests, and the cascading timeout prevention logic is missing.

issues.description: File is truncated - updateAgentStatus method signature is incomplete and implementation is missing
Missing test files entirely - no Jest unit tests provided
Missing implementation for startHeartbeatMonitoring, resumeAgent, and isAgentOnline methods that are referenced
No input validation using Zod schemas - task and status objects should be validated
Error handling is basic - should use custom error types instead of generic Error class
Missing JSDoc documentation for private methods and interfaces
No proper async/await error handling in routeTask - could lead to unhandled promise rejections
File ends abruptly in the middle of method signature (`async updateAgentStatus(status: AgentStatus): Promi...`). This is a syntax error preventing compilation.
Missing implementation of `updateAgentStatus` and any downstream logic. The file is incomplete.
No unit tests provided for validateTaskExecution or routeTask to ensure pre-execution validation works as expected.
Task specification calls for preventing cascading timeouts, but there is no explicit timeout or cancellation logic in routing or execution.

tasks.description: Implement task validation layer per CTO-20260309-002
tasks.context: Add validation layer in backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts. Check file path exists in real tree, validate context length <600 chars, ensure single-file scope. Reject invalid tasks before agent dispatch. Return structured error with fix hints.

tasks.description: Wire task validator into orchestrator routing logic
tasks.context: Modify backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to call task-complexity-validator before agent dispatch. If validation fails, return error immediately without attempting execution. Log validation failures separately from execution failures for debugging.

tasks.description: Add circuit breaker to prevent agent overload
tasks.context: Extend backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts with circuit breaker pattern. Track failure rate per agent. If >50% failures in 5min window, pause routing to that agent for 10min cooldown. Prevents retry storms. Log breaker state changes.

tasks.description: Add orchestrator health endpoint for monitoring
tasks.context: Create new health check in backend/src/routes/health.ts that exposes orchestrator state: active agents, circuit breaker status, queue depth, last successful execution timestamp. Enable external monitoring of pipeline health.
